_meta.description: Shōnen manga cover generation workflow for FLUX.1-dev
notes: Designed for Pearl Star 16GB VRAM with FLUX.1-dev fp8 quantization.
OpenPose ControlNet inputs are patched in at runtime if character sheet exists.
Seed, steps, resolution, and prompts are runtime-patched by cover_generator.py.
Higher CFG (7.0) and euler_ancestral sampler for vibrant high-energy output.

_meta.note: This node is in the workflow but bypassed when no character sheet exists. cover_generator.py patches the conditioning chain to skip nodes 10-12 when controlnet_config is None.
